author: zen
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. A clean timeline calendar with grid-aligned time labels for daily notes and tasks.

manifest.description: A clean timeline calendar with grid-aligned time labels.
manifest.name: Timeline Calendar

name: Timeline Calendar

releases.author: deemsd
releases.description:
Code quality improvements

- Removed unused imports (useEvents, useView, t)
- Cleaned up unused catch variables
- All marketplace review recommendations resolved
releases.name: v2.0.1

releases.author: deemsd
releases.description:
Major release - Bug fixes and performance improvements

- Fixed drag-and-drop issues in week/day view
- Fixed month view initial render stability
- Added event operation queue to prevent race conditions
- Optimized store subscriptions for better performance
- Migrated from localStorage to Obsidian plugin data API
- Resolved all Obsidian marketplace review warnings
- Updated minAppVersion to 1.7.2
releases.name: v2.0.0
